prestazioni: Engine: AJ133 5.0L Supercharged V8 (550 HP stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley I-beam connecting rods, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), and a billet crankshaft from Callies Performance. Supercharger pulley swap to a 2.4" ATI harmonic balancer with a custom 3.2" upper pulley for 12-14 PSI boost, paired with a Whipple 4.0L Gen 5 supercharger (replacing the stock 2.4L unit) for linear power delivery up to 8,500 RPM.

Forced Induction: Custom dual-core intercooler from CSF Racing (direct-fit for the F-Type SVR’s front bumper ducting) with 1,200 CFM airflow capacity, paired with a TiAL MV-R 50mm blow-off valve and a custom 3.5" silicone charge pipe kit from Vibrant Performance. Upgraded fuel system includes dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700X injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Quaife ATB helical LSD with a 3.73:1 final drive ratio (replacing the stock 3.31:1), paired with a Tilton Engineering twin-disc carbon clutch and a lightened flywheel. Öhlins Road & Track coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, Eibach Pro-Kit springs (20mm drop), and spherical bearing upper control arms from SuperPro for camber/caster adjustability. Brembo GT 6-piston calipers with 400mm two-piece rotors (front) and 380mm (rear) for track use.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (F-Type SVR-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, extended rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler. Custom 3D-printed front splitter with integrated canards from APR Performance, and a carbon fiber diffuser from Seibon Carbon. Side skirts modified to house dual 3" exhaust outlets from Akrapović (Titanium Evolution Line).

Wheels & Tires: HRE FF15 20x10.5" (front) and 20x12" (rear) forged wheels with a 5x108 PCD, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 325/25/20 rear). Custom wheel spacers from BMS Racing (15mm front, 25mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment.

Interior & Exterior: Full carbon fiber interior trim from V Carbon (dashboard, door cards, center console) with Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SPG XL seats (heated/ventilated). Custom roll cage from Custom Cages UK (MIG-welded T45 steel, bolt-in design) with harness bar integration. Exterior paint: BASF Glasurit 90-Line custom matte British Racing Green with gold pinstriping by Trimcraft.
